basis_summary: MedAutoScience remains the admitted Research Ops domain gateway and has absorbed its integration harness activation baseline on main.
RedCube AI remains the admitted Presentation Ops domain gateway family entry and has absorbed its source-intake plus shared-source-truth baseline on main.
Grant Foundry -> Med Auto Grant remains signal-only / domain-direction evidence only and does not count toward admitted-domain activation readiness.

activated_domain_surfaces.stability_basis: repo-side activation baseline absorbed; remaining blockers sit outside OPL truth ownership
repo-side source-intake plus shared-source-truth baseline absorbed; formal entry stays stable at MCP/CLI

scope: strengthen top-level gateway/federation wording for already admitted domains only
